mapper.update: update prompt set view_count = GREATEST(coalesce(view_count, 0) + #{viewCount}, 0), like_count = GREATEST(coalesce(like_count, 0) + #{likeCount}, 0), favorite_count = GREATEST(coalesce(favorite_count, 0) + #{favoriteCount}, 0), copy_count = GREATEST(coalesce(copy_count, 0) + #{copyCount}, 0) where id = #{promptId}
mapper.select: select *, match(title, content) against(#{keyword} in natural language mode) as score from prompt where user_id = #{userId} and match(title, content) against(#{keyword} in natural language mode) and deleted = 0 order by score desc, create_time desc

select *, match(title, content) against(#{keyword} in natural language mode) as score from prompt where visibility = #{visibility} and status = #{status} and match(title, content) against(#{keyword} in natural language mode) and deleted = 0 order by score desc, create_time desc
